mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO inventory_check_item ( check_id, medicine_id, batch_no, system_quantity, actual_quantity, difference_quantity, reason ) VALUES
( #{item.checkId}, #{item.medicineId}, #{item.batchNo}, #{item.systemQuantity}, #{item.actualQuantity}, #{item.differenceQuantity}, #{item.reason} )
mapper.select: SELECT ic.id, ic.check_no, ic.status, ic.remark, ic.created_by, cu.real_name AS created_by_name, ic.executed_by, eu.real_name AS executed_by_name, ic.created_at, ic.executed_at FROM inventory_check ic LEFT JOIN sys_user cu ON ic.created_by = cu.id LEFT JOIN sys_user eu ON ic.executed_by = eu.id WHERE ic.id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT ici.id, ici.check_id, ici.medicine_id, m.medicine_code, m.medicine_name, ici.batch_no, ici.system_quantity, ici.actual_quantity, ici.difference_quantity, ici.reason FROM inventory_check_item ici INNER JOIN medicine m ON ici.medicine_id = m.id WHERE ici.check_id = #{checkId} ORDER BY ici.id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE inventory_check SET status = 'EXECUTED', executed_by = #{executedBy}, executed_at = #{executedAt} WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'DRAFT'
